title: Price Management - Adding and managing price levels
workflow_title: Price Management - Adding and managing price levels

steps.caption: In the DISH POS Backoffice, under Articles open Price levels.
Click Add price level to create a new one.
Give the price level a Name, for example Takeaway menu.
Set the Sort order (its order in the Backoffice) and Number in app (its order in the app).
A price level can be used by a key in the app, or linked to a facility, customer or store.
Click Save to store the price level.
